$username..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.val() === auth.uid) || (data.val() === auth.uid && (newData.val() === auth.uid || newData.val() === null)))

$postId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid : data.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid)

$commentId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid : data.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('communityPosts').child($postId).child('authorId').val() === auth.uid)

$id..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('senderId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('receiverId').isString() && newData.child('status').val() === 'pending') || (data.exists() && (data.child('senderId').val() === auth.uid || data.child('receiverId').val() === auth.uid) && newData.child('senderId').val() === data.child('senderId').val() && newData.child('receiverId').val() === data.child('receiverId').val()))

$routeId..write: auth != null && ((auth.token.admin === true || auth.token.role === 'admin') || (!data.exists() && newData.child('sugeridoPor').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('sugeridoPor').val() === auth.uid && (newData.child('sugeridoPor').val() === auth.uid || !newData.exists())))

$segmentId..write: auth != null && ((auth.token.admin === true || auth.token.role === 'admin') || (!data.exists() && newData.child('createdBy').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('createdBy').val() === auth.uid && (newData.child('createdBy').val() === auth.uid || !newData.exists())))

$attemptId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('userId').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('userId').val() === auth.uid && (newData.child('userId').val() === auth.uid || !newData.exists())))

$poiId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('criadoPor').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('criadoPor').val() === auth.uid && (newData.child('criadoPor').val() === auth.uid || !newData.exists())))
